creator: gabriel@maxpark.cz
text:
Dear FreeBSD webmaster,

according to the information on the vendor page I would like to list my company under the Consulting page.

Company name: CORE ZONE s.r.o.
Website: http://corezone.cz
About: CORE ZONE s.r.o. is an outsourcing and consulting company focused on delivering the best IT solutions to its customers. We can take care of your IT infrastructure or help you with your IT projects.  We install, administer and support systems based on FreeBSD, OpenBSD, Linux (CentOS, Debian, Ubuntu). We are located in Prague, Czech Republic. Visit our webpage at http://corezone.cz and contact us at info@corezone.cz.


Thanks in advance,
Gabriel
